description: Let workspace admins manage members without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Adding membership audit records
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes recorded so that the team has an audit trail.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership changes create audit log entries.
Audit entries capture who changed access and what changed.

userStories.title: Inviting workspace members
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new people can join.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can invite a member by email.
Invited members are created with workspace access.

userStories.title: Changing member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change roles between viewer, editor, and admin so that access matches responsibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can update a member role to viewer, editor, or admin.
Role changes persist and update the member record.

userStories.title: Revoking workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke access so that removed members can no longer enter the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can revoke a member’s workspace access.
Revoked members no longer appear as active members.

userStories.title: Viewing membership changes
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings show recent membership changes.
Audit data is readable from the settings page.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
